system: Sum of all DDG Mod sub-elements

FY26 install schedule: HM&E Mod 1 ship / DDG MOD 1.0 1 ship / DDG MOD 1.5 2 ships / DMP2 1 ship / DDG MOD 2.0 0 ships. SPY-6(V)4 FY26 procurement is for 2 future DDG MOD 2.0 ships (FY30/31). Per-ship division not shown because procurement year != install year.

Missile inventory is fleet-wide procurement not budgeted per vessel. DDG-51 Flight III has 96 VLS cells (MK 41). Typical loadout mix is classified/variable. Per-ship missile cost is an allocation judgment not a budgeted figure.
